svg.aria-label: The same trajectory hit by a disturbance kick partway through: feedforward only steps off the reference and never recovers while feedforward plus feedback dips then returns to the reference, with the feedback command spiking exactly at the disturbance
svg.title: The same trajectory hit by a disturbance kick partway through: feedforward only steps off the reference and never recovers while feedforward plus feedback dips then returns to the reference, with the feedback command spiking exactly at the disturbance
svg.text: Why feedback is still essential: disturbance rejection
feedback command spikes at the disturbance
